customrecordcustomfield.help: Any payable whose Date field is before the specified date will not sync. This applies to records in both Bill.com or NetSuite.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Payables Sync Start Date

customrecordcustomfield.help: Any payable that is created in Bill.com and synced to NetSuite will be coded to this location. This only applies to top-level locations for a payable, it does not affect the coding for individual line items.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Payables Location

customrecordcustomfield.help: Any payable that is created in Bill.com and synced to NetSuite will be coded to this department. This only applies to top-level departments for a payable, it does not affect the coding for individual line items.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Payables Department

customrecordcustomfield.help: Any payable that is created in Bill.com and synced to NetSuite will be coded to this class. This only applies to top-level classifications for a payable, it does not affect the coding for individual line items.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Payables Class

customrecordcustomfield.help: This field denotes the NetSuite subsidiary that is syncing with the previously specified Bill.com organization. Do not change this field.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Subsidiary

customrecordcustomfield.help: If this box is checked, then this company/subsidiary is currently syncing with Bill.com.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Sync In Progress

customrecordcustomfield.help: Check this box to prevent files that have been attached to transactions in NetSuite from syncing.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Disable Document Sync for AP

customrecordcustomfield.help: Enter the user name of an Administrator in the previously specified Bill.com organization. This is required to sync payments from NetSuite to Bill.com. If you are Paying via Bill.com within NetSuite, this user also must be authorized on the bank account(s) used for Bill.com payments.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Bill.com Email

customrecordcustomfield.help: If this option is checked, then unpaid bills and unapplied vendor credits will sync in either direction even when their date is before the Payables Sync Start Date.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Bypass Start Date for Unpaid/Unapplied

customrecordcustomfield.help: If this option is checked, then only bills or vendor credits that have been approved in Bill.com will sync into NetSuite. In addition, any bill or vendor credit that syncs into NetSuite will be set as Approved in NetSuite's approvals system.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Only Sync Approved Bills/Credits from BDC

customrecordcustomfield.help: This field denotes the environment of this NetSuite account. Do not change this field.
customrecordcustomfield.label: NetSuite Domain

customrecordcustomfield.help: When you have enabled syncing for any classifications you use in your payables, check this box. Checking this box and saving the record will allow you to edit your Transactions preferences.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Lists Preferences Setup Complete

customrecordcustomfield.help: When you have set your transaction preferences, check this box. This will allow transactions to sync with Bill.com.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Transactions Preferences Setup Complete

customrecordcustomfield.help: This preference record is created or updated on version 2.1.0. when it is checked.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Created/Update on 2.1.0

customrecordcustomfield.help: Check this box to allow customers to sync to and from Bill.com.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Enable Customer Sync

customrecordcustomfield.help: Check this box to allow items to sync to and from Bill.com.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Enable Item Sync

customrecordcustomfield.help: Check this box to prevent items with the subtype: For Purchase from syncing from NetSuite to Bill.com. This has no impact if Enable Item Sync is not checked.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Disable Item for Purchase Sync

customrecordcustomfield.help: Check this box to prevent items with the subtype: For Sale from syncing from NetSuite to Bill.com. This has no impact if Enable Item Sync is not checked.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Disable Item for Sale Sync

customrecordcustomfield.help: Check this box to prevent items with the subtype: For Resale from syncing from NetSuite to Bill.com. This has no impact if Enable Item Sync is not checked.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Disable Item for Resale Sync

customrecordcustomfield.help: Check this box to allow departments to sync to and from Bill.com.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Enable Department Sync

customrecordcustomfield.help: Check this box to allow classes to sync to and from Bill.com.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Enable Class Sync

customrecordcustomfield.help: Check this box to allow locations to sync to and from Bill.com.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Enable Location Sync

customrecordcustomfield.help: If this option is checked, then we will not sync unpaid bills / vendor credits from NetSuite to Bill.com. By default, this option will be unchecked. If this option is unchecked, we will sync the unpaid bills/vendor credits from NetSuite to Bill.com.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Don't Sync Unpaid/Unapplied from NS

customrecordcustomfield.help: If this option is checked, customer information coded in the bills or vendor credits will not sync from NetSuite to Bill.com. This option is unchecked by default. If this option is unchecked, customer information will sync along with the bills and vendor credits from NetSuite to Bill.com
customrecordcustomfield.label: Ignore Customers in Bills/Vendor Credits

customrecordcustomfield.help: If this option is checked, then only bills that have been approved in NetSuite will sync into Bill.com.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Only Sync Approved Bills from NS

customrecordcustomfield.help: Any receivable that is created in Bill.com and synced to NetSuite will be coded to this location. This only applies to top-level locations for a receivable, it does not affect the coding for individual line items.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Receivables Location

customrecordcustomfield.help: Any receivable that is created in Bill.com and synced to NetSuite will be coded to this department. This only applies to top-level departments for a receivable, it does not affect the coding for individual line items.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Receivables Department

customrecordcustomfield.help: Any receivable that is created in Bill.com and synced to NetSuite will be coded to this class. This only applies to top-level classifications for a receivable, it does not affect the coding for individual line items.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Receivables Class

customrecordcustomfield.help: This field denotes the ID of the syncing Bill.com organization. Do not change this field.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Bill.com Organization ID

customrecordcustomfield.help: This field denotes the environment that the syncing Bill.com organization resides in. Do not change this field.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Bill.com Domain

customrecordcustomfield.help: This field denotes the sync token that is used to authenticate the sync with Bill.com. Do not change this field.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Bill.com Token

customrecordcustomfield.help: This field denotes the most recent time a sync was run. Do not change this field.
customrecordcustomfield.label: Last Integration Time (File)

customrecordcustomfield.help: This field denotes the account chosen as the Bill.com Money Out Clearing account in the Sync Preferences within Bill.com. If you update the corresponding setting in Bill.com, that update will sync to this field on the next sync. Do not change this field in NetSuite.
customrecordcustomfield.label: NS Out Clearing Account ID
